footer.ctaTitle: Find your address in New Cairo
footer.description: Zidan Development is an Egyptian real estate developer building lasting value across New Cairo's most strategic districts through intelligent planning, precise execution and uncompromising quality.

home.metaTitle: Zidan Development | New Cairo Real Estate Developer
home.metaDescription: Zidan Development is a leading Egyptian real estate developer in New Cairo — apartments, duplexes and administrative units in Al Narges, Bait Al Watan, Al Andalus, Lotus and the Fifth Settlement. Direct execution, transparent payment plans, on-time delivery.

projects.title: The most distinct projects in the best areas of New Cairo
projects.description: A focused portfolio across New Cairo's strongest districts — each chosen for the balance of investment strength and real lifestyle potential.

values.title: Principles built into every project
values.description: Transparency, commitment and on-time delivery are not marketing claims — they are operational principles embedded in our process.

delivery.title: Built for long-term value
delivery.description: From structural integrity to finishing standards, every detail is supervised — and documented — so expectations are clear in writing.

cta.title: Ready to find your address in New Cairo?

contact.title: Request a call back
contact.description: Leave your details and our team will contact you shortly with tailored options across New Cairo.

video.title: A closer look at Zidan Development
video.subtitle: Step inside our work — the craft, the locations and the standard behind every project we deliver.

about.title: An owner-executor building New Cairo's next landmarks
about.description: We are not just developers — we are owners and direct executors of our projects, maintaining full control over quality, timelines and delivery standards.
about.introTitle: Built on a clear vision, executed with discipline

careers.title: Build what lasts
careers.description: Join a team that values precision, excellence and long-term vision. Your journey at Zidan Development begins here.
careers.cultureTitle: Join a team that values precision and long-term vision
careers.cultureDescription: At Zidan Development, we build more than properties — we create lasting communities. If you are ready to grow within a visionary, high-performance environment, your journey begins here.

build.title: Build what lasts
build.body: Work on projects designed to stand for decades, not seasons. Quality is the standard, not the exception.

culture.title: High-performance culture
culture.body: Join a team that values precision, excellence and long-term vision over shortcuts and noise.

direction.title: Clear direction
direction.body: Disciplined planning and transparent communication mean you always know what good looks like.

grow.title: Grow with intent
grow.body: We invest in people who want to grow within a visionary, owner-led organisation.

careers.applyDescription: Share your details and CV. If your profile matches an open role, our team will reach out.

applyPoints.review: We review every application against current and upcoming roles.
applyPoints.privacy: Your data is handled in line with our Privacy Policy.

delivery.title: Built for long-term value
delivery.description: With direct execution and strict supervision, every project is delivered to a documented standard — protecting quality and timelines.

blog.title: Perspectives on New Cairo real estate
blog.description: Market signals, decision frameworks and the details that protect value — written by the people who build it.
blog.emptyBody: Check back soon for market insights and project updates.

faqs.title: Buyer questions, answered
faqs.description: Payment plans, delivery timelines, finishing specifications, maintenance fees, contracts and resale — everything you should verify before booking.
faqs.shortlistBody: Share your budget, preferred area and whether you're buying for living or investment — then we'll recommend the best available option.

contact.title: We're here to help
contact.description: Leave your details and our team will contact you shortly with tailored options across New Cairo. Zidan units are not subject to the Social Housing Initiative.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.contactBody: For any privacy-related questions, email <email>{emailAddr}</email> or call <phone>{phoneNum}</phone>.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.body: Zidan Development ("we", "us") respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through this website, why we collect it, and how we keep it safe. By using this site, you agree to the practices described here.

collect.title: 2. Information we collect
collect.body: We only collect the information you choose to share with us — typically your name, phone number, email and area of interest when you submit a form, or the contents of an application and CV when you apply for a role. We also collect limited technical data (such as browser type) needed to operate and secure the site.

use.title: 3. How we use your information
use.body: We use your information to respond to enquiries, share relevant project information, process applications, and improve our services. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

security.title: 4. Data security
security.body: All submissions are validated on our servers and handled through secured channels. Access to personal data is restricted to authorised team members. While we work to protect your information, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies & analytics
cookies.body: We may use privacy-conscious analytics to understand how the site is used. You can control cookies through your browser settings at any time.

rights.title: 6. Your rights
rights.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. To exercise any of these rights, contact us using the details below.
